seo.title: ClearBank API — Payment Gateway / PSP

when_to_use: GBP/EUR clearing and settlement BaaS for UK fintech companies
Faster Payments and CHAPS access via API for non-bank financial products
SEPA payment processing for EU-facing fintech built on ClearBank rails
Embedded UK bank account creation for neobanks and e-money institutions

review.verdict: Rare fully-licensed clearing API — credible bank-rail infrastructure for fintechs that need the real thing.
review.best_for: UK fintechs needing direct clearing, safeguarding, and BaaS rails
review.not_for: Consumer merchants wanting a card-acceptance gateway
